pages.page:
DANCE FOR THE PEOPLE 17.《幻世⻓安》Echoes of Chang'an 编舞 Wanru Lin · 指导 Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li Marcella He, Serena Huang, Celina Kwan, Lylia Liu, Catherine Ouyang, Priscilla Wang, Mengyi Xie 婉茹舞蹈学校 ANNUAL SHOWCASE 2026 18.《戏说流年》Jokes Of The Past
——— ❖ ——— 指导 Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li Queens Theatre, Flushing Meadows Corona Park · June 27, 2026 · 5:30 PM 戏⽂说 KimberleyZhang ｜ 拉岗踏歌 Jinzhu Yang, Rose Liu ｜ ⻜花蝶舞 Chunying Liu ｜ 天浴 Sally Wen, Jiayi Wang 序 · 破晓 Prologue · Daybreak 19.《蝴蝶》The Butterfly 1.《唐乐》Palace of Tang 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin Marcella He, Serena Huang, Celina Kwan, Lylia Liu, Catherine Ouyang, Mengyi Xie Selena Fang, Cecelia Ho, Jasmin Hu, Winnifred Jiang, Lucia Jin, Sarah Liu, Vicky Wang, Rayne Zhao, Isabella Fung 20.《筷⼦舞》Chopstick Dance 2.《芭蕾启蒙班基本功》Ballet · Foundations 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin 编舞·指导 Ana Timashenko Lucia Jin Alyssa Ni, Leah Lin, Gabby Wang, Olivia Li, Freya Wang, Arya Zhou, Robin Flores, Bella Huang, Raina Feng, Amelia Pan, Bella Luo 21.《顶碗舞》Bowl Dance 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin 3.《雀跃》Little Chirping Birds Marcella He, Serena Huang, Celina Kwan, Lylia Liu, Catherine Ouyang, Mengyi Xie, Ellie Liao, 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin 助教：Rose Liu Kaitlyn Chui, Ivey Lam, Gianna Liu, Lystra Liu, Ellie Ng, Qianyu Chen, Lolita Luo, Mengran Xie, Isabella Qu, Luna Huang, Claire Lin, Ella Xie Queenie Zha, Olivia Qu, Nikkie Kun, Zihan Lin, Emma Qu, Leia Guan, Marilyn Chui 4.《舞韵芳华》The Grace of Dance 盛 · ⻛华 Bloom · Splendor 指导 Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li 22.《越⼥凌峰》The Maiden of Yue Soars Over Peaks 帕⽶尔之情 Sally Wen, Jinzhu Yang｜⾬涧春形图 Sherry Lyu 上铃⿎ Kimberley Zhang, Wen Wang｜ 淡妆 浓抹总相宜 Fang Liu, Wei Guo 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin Marcella He 5.《唐宫夜宴》Tang Palace Night Banquet 编舞·指导 Eva Li 23. 《芭蕾班》 Ballet · Intermediate Roulin Fu, Mia W.Guo, Amelia Hong, Aliyah Zeng, Maria Elena Hua Pertsinidis, Seraphina Ahmari 编舞·指导 Ana Timashenko 6.《波尔卡》Polka Emma Cao, Evelyn Huang, Valerie Lan, Camille Li, Hayley Zhou, Sia Luo 编舞·指导 Ana Timashenko Joanna Chen, Clair Jin, Alyssa Ni, Yiran Yuan 24. 《鸿雁⾼⻜》 Wild Geese Soaring 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li 7.《花⼉》Flower Jingxi Li, Yiting Chen, Kathy Li, Jinzhu Yang, Sally Wen, Rose Liu, Janice Ku, Diana Liu 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin Priscilla Wang 25. 《中国舞基本功展⽰》 Chinese Dance · Advanced Zeng, Maria Elena Hua Pertsinidis, Alina Dai, Seraphina Winnifred Jiang, Lucia Jin, Sarah Liu, Rayne Zhao, Gianna Liu, Kaitlyn Chui, Leia Guan, Ellie Ahmari, Isabella Qu, Luna Huang, Claire Lin, Ella Xie, Lina Huang Liao, Qianyu Chen, Maggie Chen, Galina Gao, Jennifer Jiang, Ivey Lam 9.《⻘花瓷》Blue & White Porcelain 26. 《盛世霓裳》Splendid Era’s Beauty 编舞·指导 Jun Chow 指导 Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li Jun Chow, Fang Liu, Ting Lin, Ting Ahmari, Sally Wang, Luyao Wang, Hillary Hua, Ai Zhang, Judy Zhu, Yi Lu 醉清波 Sally Wen, Wei Guo ｜ 莲⿎越歌⾏ Rose Liu, Sherry Lyu, Chunying Liu ｜ 迦陵频伽 Wen Wang, Stina Wen, Wei Guo, Jiayi Wang ⾏ · 流转 Movement · Flowing 27. 《能不忆江南》 Fair South Recalled 10.《⽩鹭游》White Egret in Flight 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin, Yifei Wang Selena Fang, Cecelia Ho, Jasmin Hu, Lucia Jin, Sarah Liu, Vicky Wang, Rayne Zhao, Isabella Breanna Lu, Lolita Luo, Mengran Xie, Queenie Zha, Angelina Zhang, Olivia Qu Fung 11.《纸扇书⽣》The Paper Fan Scholar 28. 《璀璨》Brilliant 编舞·指导 Eric Wang 编舞 Shuqi Cong Maggie Chen, Galina Gao, Leia Guan, Jennifer Jiang, Iris Linzheng, Olivia Linzheng, Lystra Liu Jinzhu Yang 12.《胡旋舞》Sogdian Whirl Dance 29. 《袖舞繁花》 Blossoms with Flowing Sleeves ｜ Folkloric Competitive
编舞 Wanru Lin · 指导 Wanru Lin, Yifei Wang Marilyn Chui, Victoria Fung, Freya Guo, Jayleen Huang, Nikkie Kun, Brianna Liu, Angelia Sun, 编舞·指导 Wenhua Nie, Wanru Lin Charlotte Wang, Siyu Zhu Qianyu Chen, Leia Guan, Marcella He, Cecilia Ho, Winnifred Jiang, Lucia Jin, Gianna Liu, Vicky Wang 13.《芭蕾中级班》Ballet · Intermediate 编舞·指导 Ana Timashenko 30. 《越⼥词》Song of the Yue Maiden Yiran Yuan, Joanna Chen, Angelina Zhang, Claire Jin, Phyllis Zheng, Mignon Zheng, Irene 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin Chau, Breanna Lu, Aiden Jin, Aven Jin Mengyi Xie 14.《天鹅》Mongolian Swan 31. 《伎乐⻜天》 Moonlight Goddess
编舞 Wanru Lin · 指导 Wanru Lin ｜ 助教 Rose Liu 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin Emma Cao, Evelyn Huang, Valerie Lan, Camille Li, Hayley Zhou Selena Fang, Marcella He, Cecelia Ho, JasminHu, Winnifred Jiang, Lucia Jin, Sarah Liu, Vicky Wang, AnchenYi, Rayne Zhao 15.《格格》Bare Foot Princess 编舞·指导 Wanru Lin ⼯作⼈员 Production Team Angela Lau 总导演 · Wanru Lin 摄影 / 摄像 · Vincent Sun、 Spike Li 16.《中国舞基本功展⽰》Chinese Dance · Intermediate 执⾏导演 · Liang Ming, Eva Li 毕业⽣短⽚制作 · Mingzhe Li 编舞 & 排练总监 · WenXu, Jingxi Li，Yifei Wang 编舞·指导 Jingxi Li, Yifei Wang 舞台总监 · Chloe Zhai, Christina Che 统筹 · Rose Liu Lolita Luo, Mengran Xie, Queenie Zha, Olivia Qu, Zihan Lin, Livia Liu, Marilyn Chui, Victoria 灯光 / ⾳响 · Eva Li 场刊设计 · Wanru Lin, Jingxi Li，Chloe Zhai，Eric Zhai Fung, Freya Guo, Jayleen Huang, Nikkie Kun, Brianna Liu, Angelia Sun, Charlotte Wang, Siyu 主持⼈ · Jia Chen、Anchen Yi、Angela Lau、Brianna 家 委 会 / 志 愿 者 · Jing Peng, Elayne Tao, Dan Dan Lin, Zhu, Emma Qu, Luella Cheng, Ellie Ng, Anna Chen Yang,Siman Liu ,Hanyan Liu, Chloe Tong Liu、Angelia Sun、Siyu Zhu Qionglin Zhu, Eric Zhai, Jia Peng, Tracy, Christine ， Jenny.
